---
title: "Interpolation and Fitting"
description: |
  Exploration in interpolation and fitting methods.
output: distill::distill_article
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# Credits

"Lagrange Interpolation" by Dr. Will Wood [Video Link Here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bzp_q7NDdd4)

"The Vandermonde Matrix and Polynomial Interpolation" by Dr. Will Wood [Video Link Here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cov_kLatdlc)

"Newton Interpolation and Divided Differences" by Dr. Will Wood [Video Link Here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S7QIU0i1qLE)

"How to calculate linear regression using least square method" by statisticsfun [Video Link Here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvS2triCgOY)

"Data Fitting: Basic Curve Fitting" Part 1 - 4 by Data4Bio [Video Link Here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V3W3rVZE0I0)



# Notes

![Interpolation 01](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-01.png){width=50%}![Interpolation 02](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-02.png){width=50%}
![Interpolation 03](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-03.png){width=50%}![Interpolation 04](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-04.png){width=50%}

![Interpolation 05](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-05.png){width=50%}![Interpolation 06](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-06.png){width=50%}

![Interpolation 07](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-07.png){width=50%}![Interpolation 08](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-08.png){width=50%}

![Interpolation 09](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-09.png){width=50%}![Interpolation 10](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-10.png){width=50%}

![Interpolation 11](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-11.png){width=50%}![Interpolation 12](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-12.png){width=50%}

![Interpolation 13](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-13.png){width=50%}![Interpolation 14](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-14.png){width=50%}
